seo.title: Payment Information | Elevate Mental Health and Wellness
seo.description: Insurance and payment information for Elevate Mental Health and Wellness. We accept Optum, Anthem, Medicare, Aetna, Magellan, and Cigna.
seo.ogDescription: Learn which insurance plans Elevate accepts and find answers to common billing questions.
seo.twitterDescription: Insurance and payment information for psychiatric care at Elevate.

site.title: Elevate Mental Health and Wellness
site.copyright: © 2026 Elevate Mental Health and Wellness. All rights reserved.

pageHero.heading: Our Clinic accepts the following Insurance Company
pageHero.intro: We work with several major insurance providers. Please contact the clinic to confirm your coverage before scheduling an appointment.

payment.heading: Accepted insurance plans
payment.intro: Coverage can vary by plan and location. Reach out if you have questions about your benefits or billing.

items.question: Do you accept insurance?
items.answer: I am currently in network with some insurance companies. Please contact the clinic to confirm your coverage before scheduling an appointment.

items.question: What are your fees?
items.answer: Fee details may vary depending on service type and insurance coverage. Contact the clinic for current pricing and billing codes.

items.question: What forms of payment do you accept?
items.answer: Payment information can be confirmed before your appointment. Use the Bill Pay option for billing convenience.

items.question: Do you offer virtual appointments?
items.answer: Yes. Virtual consultation is available for convenience through a HIPAA compliant telehealth platform.

footer.description: Providing individualized psychiatric care and brief psychotherapy designed to help you feel better and live better.
